都内唯一の屋台ラーメン🍜 ◆チャーシュー麺 (¥950) [トッピング] 味玉 (¥100) 玉ねぎ (¥50) 海苔 (¥50) ほうれん草 (¥100) 八王子にある都内で唯一の屋台ラーメン！ 都心から離れているのに行列のできる人気店 日本ならではの屋台ラーメンは趣のある雰囲気と一度食べたら忘れられない味 カウンター席とテーブル席があるがカウンター席は予約することも可能。(詳しくはお店のアカウントをチェック) ≪店舗詳細≫ 【店舗名】屋台ラーメン しゅんやっちゃん 【住所】東京都八王子市初沢町1277-8  【営業時間】18:00〜23:00 【定休日】月曜・日曜   #東京グルメ #八王子グルメ #屋台ラーメン   ====================================   Tokyo’s Only Yatai Ramen Stand in the City 🍜 ◆ Chashu Ramen (¥950) [Toppings] Ajitama Egg (¥100) Onion (¥50) Nori Seaweed (¥50) Spinach (¥100) A one-of-a-kind yatai-style ramen stand in Tokyo, located in Hachioji! Even though it’s far from central Tokyo, people line up for this incredibly popular spot. This traditional Japanese street-style ramen offers a nostalgic atmosphere and an unforgettable flavor you’ll keep craving. There are both counter and table seats available, and you can even reserve the counter seats in advance. (Check the shop’s account for details!) ≪Shop Information≫ 【Shop Name】Shunyacchan Yatai Ramen 【Address】1277-8 Hatsuzawamachi, Hachioji, Tokyo 【Hours】18:00–23:00 【Closed】Mondays & Sundays   #japanesefood

🚨Casey & Harper will be euthanized Thursday 5/28🚨 🔴I kindly ask that you please do not email the shelter for updates unless you are local and are planning to foster or adopt. Their inbox gets very busy, and unnecessary emails can slow down their ability to help the animals who need it most. Thank you for understanding!  When there is an update this post will be updated at the top of the caption.  I put the two together because it’s already so late and I need to get them seen. Casey was a good boy and actually lit up more when he saw another dog pass us. Harper is sooo scared she’s shaking so bad in her kennel even when I got her out she was terrified. Harper needs someone who will seriously give her decompression time. Casey needs to see a vet asap for the hematoma on his side!  •Questions? Check the FAQ on my Instagram highlights  •ID: Casey A2075591 2YR 50lbs HW- / Harper A2076607 1YR 29Lbs HW-  •good with cats? not sure •pledges are not physical money they are a promise to donate to a 501c3 nonprofit organizations if they intake the pet, not individuals.  Please be aware that all euth animals need a hold by 1PM. If you want to help, please be proactive do not wait! If you’re interested in a pet and live out of state, I encourage you to reach out to your local rescues to see if they pull from Texas shelters. I receive the euthanasia list from the shelter between 1–3PM, and the deadline to save the listed dogs is 1PM the following day. This timing is completely out of my control. 📌 Please contact BARC if you are local and can help! Neither BARC nor I can assist out of state adoption or foster offers. One Piece Episode 1163 - Robin & Saul reunite #robin ##onepiece #luffy #fyp #fypシ゚

In the One Piece Episode 1163, titled “I Want You to Praise Me - The Reunion of Robin and Saul,” One Piece delivered one of the most emotional reunions in the entire series as Robin finally reunited with Saul after 22 years of pain, loneliness, and survival. The little girl who once lost everything in Ohara finally broke down in tears in front of the man who first told her she deserved to live. When Robin asked, “Can you praise me for holding out this long?”, it felt like decades of heartbreak and silent suffering came pouring out at once. Seeing the Straw Hats cry beside her while Saul stood there alive again made this moment unforgettable for every One Piece fan.#onepiece1163 #robin #luffy #nicorobin #onepiece

My feelings when my cat falls into an endless, deep sleep are indescribable; they have to be experienced.
Probably not her favorite faces but I wish she knew how much we love her and care about her 😂🥹😭💕 The beloved sad girl came back in for a vet visit today.  #vet #veterinarian #doglover #vetmed

We once discussed veterinary medicine from the perspective of how humans came to the idea of helping other living creatures while spending their own time and resources on it. Strictly speaking, this mostly applies to pets, because in the industrial world veterinarians often work with farm animals. Today I want you to think about how incredibly complex this science really is. A veterinarian has to understand the anatomy and physiology of dozens of different species in order to help them. From a tiny aquarium fish to a massive python, any creature may need care, and it is honestly impressive how veterinarians manage to keep all of this knowledge in their minds while making decisions that can determine the fate of their patients. Veterinarians save tens of thousands of beloved pets and prevent epidemics among farm animals, which in many ways also means protecting human populations. Thank you, veterinarians. #Veterinarian #Medicine #Animals #edit #Pets

bakery style oreo stuffed cookies 🍪🥛    recipe: ingredients: ¾ cup salted butter, softened (170 g) ¾ cup packed brown sugar (150 g) ¼ cup granulated sugar (50 g) 1 large egg  1 tsp vanilla (5 g) 2 cups all-purpose flour (240 g) 1 tbsp cornstarch (8 g) ½ tsp baking soda (3 g) ¼ tsp salt (1.5 g) oreos, some whole some  roughly chopped  white chocolate (measure with your heart)  & choceur cookie and cream chocolate’s   instructions: cream the butter and sugars together  until smooth and slightly fluffy. mix in the egg and vanilla until fully combined. in a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, cornstarch, baking soda, and salt. fold the dry ingredients into the wet just until combined.  chop some of the oreos into small chunks ( leave some for topping ) and fold them in along with the white chocolate. scoop the dough into 8 portions, flatten and add an oreo inside and chocolate then shape into tall mounds. ( i flatten the top but keep them tall ) bake at 375°F for 11–14 minutes, until the edges are set and the centers are still soft. ( baking time may vary ) let cool to set the cookies!  i added moser roths white chocolate to the bottom & inside !    #oreo #cookies #chocolatechipcookies #Recipe #baking

Le chirurgien plasticien José Soler-Baillo, qui exerce à Miami, est devenu viral après la publication de vidéos filmées pendant ses opérations. En plein bloc opératoire, il s’ambiance sur de la house. Une pratique courante chez certains chirurgiens, car la diffusion de musique peut favoriser la concentration et créer un climat de travail plus détendu. Cependant, il est beaucoup plus rare de voir des images tournées pendant les opérations être publiées sur les réseaux sociaux. Crédit : @drsolerbaillo / IG

come with us to get Moosey’s hair cut! 🤍🐾 Cocker spaniels coats take a significant amount of work to upkeep. One piece of that is getting regular grooming! We go every 6-8 weeks, and ask for basically a show cut. Keep the smooth natural coat on top and the longer feathering on his ears, chest, legs, and belly. Just clean him up with trimming and blending so he still looks natural and fluffy in the right places. #englishcockerspaniel #cockerspaniel #cockerspanielpuppy #cockerspanielsoftiktok #cockerspanielgrooming

Bakery style chocolate chip cookies 🍪  Ingredients  3/4 cup (170g) unsalted butter, cold and cubed  3/4 cup (150g) dark brown sugar 1/3 cup (65g) granulated sugar 1 large egg + 1 egg yolk, room temp 2 tsp vanilla bean paste 2 cups (240g) all-purpose flour 1 tsp cornstarch 1 tsp espresso powder 1/2 tsp baking soda 1 tbsp milk powder  1/4 tsp baking powder 3/4 tsp salt 1 cup semi sweet chocolate chips 3/4 milk chocolate chips  Flaky sea salt for topping Method : In a bowl add all purpose flour, baking soda, baking powder, milk powder, espresso powder , corn starch and salt. Mix well to combine. In a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment, add the cold cubed butter, brown sugar, and granulated sugar. Mix on medium speed for about 2–3 minutes, until the mixture looks creamy.  Add the egg, egg yolk, and vanilla bean paste. Mix until fully combined, scraping down the sides of the bowl as needed. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture. Mix on low speed just until combined—do not overmix. Stir in the semi-sweet and milk chocolate chips until evenly distributed.  Cover and refrigerate the dough for at least 2 hours ( or up to 24 hours for deeper flavor and thicker cookies). Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Scoop large portions of dough (about ounce each) and roll loosely into balls. For a bakery look, keep them tall rather than flattened. Bake for 15-16 minutes, or until Edges are set and lightly golden. Centers are still soft and slightly underbaked. Sprinkle flaky sea salt on top immediately after baking. Let cookies cool on the baking sheet for 5–10 minutes before transferring to a wire rack. #cookies #cookierecipes #chocolatechip #cookierecipe

매일 새벽 손으로 직접 만드는 수제만두, 젊은 사장님에게서 느껴지는 '할머니의 손맛' 📍망원 연만두  (주소: 서울 마포구 망원로 77 1층 연만두)   🔗네이버 지도: https://naver.me/5Kb3ejlY   🥟만두 한 판 8,500원 / 왕치즈군만두 1개 2,500원   📦택배 신청: 매주 월요일 오후 5시까지 문자 접수 (연락처: 010-5941- 7816)   망원시장의 소문난 만두 맛집 '연만두'. 많은 분이 연세 지긋한 할머니가 운영하실 거라 오해할 만큼 깊은 손맛을 자랑하는 곳입니다. 하지만 이곳의 주인공은 만두에 인생을 건 젊은 사장님이었는데요.  그 깊은 맛의 비결은 진심어린 정성에 있었습니다.  "기계는 재료를 뭉개버린다"는 철학 아래, 매일 새벽부터 나와 모든 재료를 일일이 손으로 버무리고 직접 빚으시더라구요. 재료 하나하나의 식감이 살아있는 꽉 찬 만두 속은 그렇게 사장님의 고집으로 완성됩니다.  워낙 정성껏 소량만 준비하기 때문에 금세 품절되기로 유명한데요. 방문 전 전화 주문이나 네이버 예약을 이용하시면 헛걸음 없이 바로 가져가실 수 있으니 꼭 참고하세요!   주문 즉시 튀겨주시는 치즈 군만두는 갓 튀겨낸 바삭한 식감 속에 고소하게 늘어나는 치즈와 만두 속의 조화가 그야말로 환상적입니다.. 정성과 맛, 어느 하나 빠지지 않는 망원동의 진정한 인생 만두를 만나보세요!   - Deep flavor hand-mixed every dawn: Finding 'Grandmother's Touch' in a Young Master 📍망원 연만두 'Yeon-Mandu' (77, Mangwon-ro, Mapo-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea)   🔗 https://maps.app.goo.gl/jDhS1Q11mVTn1mBA9   'Yeon-Mandu' is a renowned dumpling spot near Mangwon Market, famous for a deep, traditional flavor that leads many to assume an elderly grandmother must be running the shop. Surprisingly, the true master behind these dumplings is a young man who has dedicated his life to this craft.   The secret to such profound flavor lies in his sincere devotion. Following his philosophy that "machines crush the ingredients' texture," he starts his day in the early hours of the dawn, hand-mixing and folding every single dumpling. This stubborn commitment is what creates the perfect filling, where the texture of each ingredient remains intact and vibrant.   Because each dumpling is made with such meticulous care in limited quantities, they are famous for selling out quickly. We highly recommend placing a phone order or using Naver Reservation before your visit to ensure you don't miss out!  Don't miss the Cheese Fried Dumplings, fried to order for a perfectly crispy texture. The harmony of the savory, melting cheese and the rich dumpling filling is simply heavenly. Come and experience a true "life-changing" dumpling in Mangwon-dong, where passion and tradition meet! 🥟 #서울맛집 #망원동 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood

topoki abrasileirado 🇰🇷🇧🇷 Ingredientes * 1 xícara de farinha de arroz * 1/2 xícara de farinha de arroz glutinoso ou polvilho doce * 1 xícara de água fervente * 2 colheres de chá de sal * 1 lata de extrato de tomate * 150g de queijo muçarela * sal a gosto * Pimenta do reino Modo de preparo Numa tigela junte a farinha de arroz, a farinha de arroz glutinoso e o sal e misture.  Adicione uma xícara de água fervente com o hashi, depois que a massa criar mais consistência, sove ela com as mãos para uniformizar a massa. Divida a massa em 8 partes e faça cobrinhas e corte no tamanho desejado. Em uma frigideira, adicione água e ferva as massas até elas emergirem, logo após, adicione o extrato de tometa, ajuste o sal e pimenta e finalize com queijo.

“But she’s just a corgi…”  Meet Maple the 4 year old Corgi.  Sweet in the right moments… but dangerous in the wrong ones. Resource guarding food and household items. Multiple bites on owners and family members. Reactive to other dogs on walks, barking & lunging. And now there’s a baby in the home. During the evaluation, Maple tried to bite me multiple times. Not because she’s a “bad dog”… But because she’s been making decisions for a long time without clear direction. No real structure. No consistent boundaries. No clear communication or expectations. And when you let “dogs be dogs” they do just that.  This is the part people struggle with.. You can love your dog deeply and still be missing the leadership they actually need. Honest question… Do you think dogs like Maple know they’re doing something wrong… or are they just doing what’s always worked for them? #DogTraining #dogtrainer #dogsoftiktok #dogs #dog
